response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Conservative policy + your SoC (0.10) well below our minimum threshold (0.5) + island depletion risk at 1.6 kWh/hour decline makes sharing unsustainable; self-preservation required unless reconnection imminent.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c5. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded SoC declining at ~1.6 kWh/hour; neighbors critically depleted. Minimal sharing (0.15 kW/tick max) to most critical peer only if reconnection or load reduction expected within 4 ticks. Otherwise, full self-preservation..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
